meta.project: Mesabi Metallics AI-native Pit-to-Pellet Operating Brain
meta.dataClassification: Synthetic demo data only - no Mesabi operational data

scenario.name: Construction-to-operations handoff with agentic AI war-room
script: Video twin detects a haulage and stockpile movement signal. The Supervisor Agent starts with low-data visual, schedule and checklist intelligence.
Readiness Control Tower correlates mechanical completion, training, spares, HSE and commissioning evidence. Leaders see subsystem handoff risk before first pellet.
Processing Agent simulates ore blend, P80, silica, Fe grade, moisture and pellet strength. It recommends operating windows with recovery and energy trade-offs.
Geology Agent validates drillhole QAQC and highlights low-confidence orebody zones. It produces drill program options and model confidence heat maps.
Reliability, fleet and ESG sentinels rank crusher, conveyor, haulage, water, dust and carbon risks. Each recommendation gets an owner and approval route.
Executive War-Room generates board-ready outputs. The demo ends with a PoV charter, evidence pack, action log and KPI-owned value case.

chain.name: Construction readiness
chain.focus: Mechanical completion, handover, SOPs, training, spares, HSE
chain.primaryAction: Close 18 critical A-punch items before commissioning freeze.

chain.name: Geology & exploration
chain.focus: Drillhole QAQC, resource confidence, wireframe/solid model assist
chain.primaryAction: Reconcile duplicate assay intervals and run cutoff sensitivity scenario.

chain.name: Mine + fleet
chain.focus: Pit readiness, haul routes, autonomous haulage integration and queue intelligence
chain.primaryAction: Simulate truck-shovel queue at north stockpile and staging bay.

chain.name: Beneficiation
chain.focus: Crushing, grinding, liberation, recovery and Fe/SiO₂ stability
chain.primaryAction: Tune P80 and water addition window for high-silica ore blend.

chain.name: Pellet plant
chain.focus: Moisture, green ball quality, induration, pellet strength and lot genealogy
chain.primaryAction: Run pellet strength sensitivity across moisture and binder setpoints.

chain.name: ESG + shipping
chain.focus: Carbon, water, dust, rail shipment readiness and green-steel traceability
chain.primaryAction: Publish water/dust/carbon evidence pack for launch governance.

events.summary: Video twin indicates two haul units converging near stockpile entry; queue risk rises before shift handoff.
Synthetic process signals show grind size and silica drift that may raise pellet off-spec risk within two hours.
A-punch completion, critical spares and training evidence are not yet aligned for the subsystem release gate.

riskInsights.title: Off-spec risk is explainable
riskInsights.body: The current risk score is driven by high-silica blend, P80 drift and moisture movement rather than a black-box quality alert.

riskInsights.title: Simulation-first approach works before history matures
riskInsights.body: The agent uses first-principles constraints, test-work assumptions and synthetic ramp-up scenarios until enough operational history exists.

riskInsights.title: Recommended action is approval-gated
riskInsights.body: No setpoint is changed automatically. The system prepares recovery, quality and energy trade-offs for a process owner approval.

readinessPack.title: Subsystem 3C commissioning readiness pack
readinessPack.area: Crusher transfer tower / conveyor C-12 / beneficiation feed
readinessPack.evidence: 48 checklist items, 12 OEM extracts, 7 training records, 4 spares exceptions
readinessPack.approval: Operations readiness owner + maintenance owner + HSE owner

timeline.label: Schedule variance detected
timeline.detail: Primavera/MS Project milestone for subsystem 3C drifts by 3.5 days because inspection, OEM witness and punch closure are misaligned.

timeline.label: Evidence ingestion completed
timeline.detail: SOP index, equipment hierarchy, inspection pack, OEM checklist and training roster are normalized into the readiness data spine.

timeline.label: Readiness gap diagnosed
timeline.detail: The agent flags critical spares ambiguity and incomplete confined-space permit matrix for pre-commissioning activities.

timeline.label: Readiness pack generated
timeline.detail: Word/PDF narrative, Excel punch tracker, schedule delta, RACI and approval summary are created for the daily war-room.

geologyWorkbench.title: Drillhole QAQC exception register
geologyWorkbench.body: 19 exceptions clustered around duplicate intervals, failed blanks and missing density values. Agent recommends validation before resource scenario freeze.

geologyWorkbench.title: Model confidence heat map
geologyWorkbench.body: Seven low-confidence zones are highlighted near ore-waste boundaries with dilution and cutoff sensitivity warnings.

geologyWorkbench.title: Resource scenario book
geologyWorkbench.body: Monte Carlo scenario compares Fe grade continuity, silica penalty risk and value-at-risk under three drill-spacing options.

geologyWorkbench.title: Drill program optimizer
geologyWorkbench.body: Next drill targets ranked by uncertainty reduction, permitting readiness, access practicality and value impact.

actions.title: Validate drillhole QAQC exceptions before model freeze
Inspect conveyor C-12 bearing temperature anomaly

roadmap.title: AI value workshop
roadmap.body: Confirm use cases, KPI baselines, data owners, decision owners and approval logic.

roadmap.title: Data discovery
roadmap.body: Map SAP/ERP, FMS, autonomous haulage, SCADA/historian, LIMS, CMMS, GIS, contracts and ESG feeds.

roadmap.title: Mission-control prototype
roadmap.body: Build executive cockpit, synthetic data model, video twin, first agent narratives and evidence vault.

roadmap.title: Quality + reliability pilots
roadmap.body: Pilot pellet quality, crusher/conveyor reliability and explainable recommendations.

roadmap.title: ESG + logistics pilots
roadmap.body: Add carbon, water, dust and shipment-risk evidence workflows.

roadmap.title: AI war-room operating model
roadmap.body: Run daily simulation, approvals, handover routines and value tracking for funding decision.

Simulation report, trend chart, trade-off table

governanceMatrix.kpi: Failure lead time, unplanned downtime risk

Board-ready ESG pack and audit trail

knowledgeQuestions.q: Which agents should Mesabi approve first?
knowledgeQuestions.a: Start with three low-data agents: Readiness Control Tower, Commissioning Evidence Copilot and Digital SOP/Training Agent. Add two ramp-up pilots in parallel: Process Quality Agent and Reliability Agent. This mirrors the deck logic of proving value before historical operating data matures.

knowledgeQuestions.q: How does this work with limited historical data?
knowledgeQuestions.a: The demo uses rules, engineering constraints, OEM manuals, SOPs, schedules, commissioning packs, first-principles models and synthetic scenarios first. Live-learning predictive models are introduced after Mesabi builds operating history during commissioning and ramp-up.

knowledgeQuestions.q: What tangible outputs does the operating brain generate?
knowledgeQuestions.a: It generates readiness packs, punch lists, QAQC exception registers, process quality reports, simulation summaries, work-order recommendations, ESG evidence packs, board-ready PPT/PDF outputs and exportable JSON/CSV datasets.

knowledgeQuestions.q: What is the approval value for leadership?
knowledgeQuestions.a: Leadership gets KPI-owned evidence: days to first pellet, readiness %, off-spec risk, failure lead time, ESG completeness and quantified value pools. Every agent recommendation has a business owner, evidence artifact and approval route.

knowledgeQuestions.q: How is this different from replacing SAP or FMS?
knowledgeQuestions.a: AIonOS is positioned as a governed agent layer that integrates and orchestrates SAP/ERP, FMS, autonomous haulage, SCADA/historian, LIMS, CMMS and GIS. It does not duplicate core systems; it turns their signals into decisions and evidence.
The PoV should prove working agent outputs, measurable KPI movement, data integration feasibility, human approval controls and a repeatable war-room model before Mesabi funds enterprise scale.

evidenceObjects.name: Operational readiness plan.docx / .pdf
evidenceObjects.description: AI-generated daily readiness narrative covering equipment, process, training, maintenance, spares, HSE and mechanical completion.

evidenceObjects.name: QAQC exception register.xlsx / .csv
evidenceObjects.description: Drillhole validation table with failed blanks, duplicates, missing density values and owner-assigned corrections.

evidenceObjects.name: Pellet quality simulation pack.pptx
evidenceObjects.description: Scenario book comparing blend, P80, moisture, silica, Fe grade, strength, recovery and energy trade-offs.

evidenceObjects.name: MC punch tracker.xlsx
evidenceObjects.description: A/B/C punch list with subsystem readiness, due dates, owners, schedule impact and approval notes.

evidenceObjects.name: GIS / DXF model confidence overlays
evidenceObjects.description: Heat map-style overlays that flag low-confidence orebody zones and drill program options.

evidenceObjects.name: ESG evidence spine.json / .pdf
evidenceObjects.description: Carbon, water, dust and shipment-traceability evidence for green-steel launch governance.

auditTrail.action: Detected haul-route queue risk and wrote event MES-EVT-0708.
Normalized commissioning evidence and identified subsystem 3C release risk.
Raised off-spec risk due to P80/moisture/silica combination.
Generated readiness pack and routed to human owners.

approvalControls.name: Human approval before execution
approvalControls.description: No setpoint, work order, schedule or release gate is executed automatically during PoV.

approvalControls.name: Explainability note
approvalControls.description: Each recommendation stores top drivers, confidence level, value-at-risk and source systems used.

approvalControls.name: Data boundary
approvalControls.description: Synthetic demo has no Mesabi operational data; production deployment can be on-prem, private cloud or approved cloud.

approvalControls.name: KPI owner mapping
approvalControls.description: Each agent has a business owner, technology owner, data steward and approval authority.
